name: Lyra
description: Binary stars joined by faint beams — one shared angle keeps each pair rigid while the constellation re-forms on every redraw.

code.style: --rule: ( /* one emitted angle (radians) drives the beam rotation and the partner-star trig, keeping each pair rigid */ --lar: @r(0, 6.2832); --llp: @r(16, 36); --sz: @r(7, 13); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; width: calc(@var(--llp) * 10px / @Y); height: 1.5px; background: var(--color2); opacity: 0.6; transform: rotate(calc(@var(--lar) * 57.2958deg)); transform-origin: 0% 50%; transition: ease 800ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: calc(@var(--sz) * 1%); left: calc(50% - @var(--sz) * 0.5%); top: calc(50% - @var(--sz) * 0.5%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color3); box-shadow: calc(cos(@var(--lar) * 1rad) * @var(--llp) * 10px / @Y) calc(sin(@var(--lar) * 1rad) * @var(--llp) * 10px / @Y) 0 calc(-8px / @Y) var(--color4); transition: ease 800ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
